matches.x: “Thou shalt not oppress an hired servant that is poor and needy, whether he be of thy brethren, or of thy strangers that are in thy land within thy gates: 8565At his day thou shalt give him his hire neither shall the sun go down upon it; for he is poor, and setteth his heart upon it....” (Deut. 24:14-15.) And to me that means, woe unto them who will rationalize, who will explain away their errors…
and work evil upon their beds! when the morning is light, they practise it, because it is in the power of their hand.

“Thou shalt not oppress an hired servant that is poor and needy, whether he be of thy brethren, or of thy strangers that are in thy land within thy gates: 8565At his day thou shalt give him his hire neither shall the sun go down upon it; for he is poor, and setteth his heart upon it....” (Deut. 24:14-15.) And to me that means, woe unto them who will rationalize, who will explain away their errors…
and work evil upon their beds! when the morning is light, they practise it, because it is in the power of their hand.

cast a cord by lot At certain times, the people measured their fields again. They used stones with marks on them to decide about the fields. Micah says that God is against the bad people. So God will never let them get any fields again in future times.

Chapter (82) 83: Prophets  [1] "I will assemble Jacob, all of you; I will bring together the remnant of Israel;. (Micah 2:12). Like it is said in scriptures: Assemble and listen, and complete [note: last word גומר doesn't exist in verse] (Genesis 49:2). Although the exact time of judgment day is unknown, I say to you that when you gather and assemble, at that moment you will be redeemed, as it…
